top_risks.title: Multi-agent story type-check fails
top_risks.root_cause: Missing store helpers and framer-motion imports in SessionManager
top_risks.impact: Shell integration breaks and runtime errors likely
top_risks.fix: Restore helper implementations, import motion, and re-run pnpm --filter multi-agent-story run type-check

top_risks.title: Drama analyst build blocked by TypeScript errors
top_risks.root_cause: Outdated typings and invalid mocks across orchestration and UI modules
top_risks.fix: Align React 19 types, correct mocks, and pass pnpm --filter drama-analyst run type-check

top_risks.title: ESLint crashes with react-hooks plugin
top_risks.root_cause: Plugin version incompatible with TypeScript 5.9 AST
top_risks.impact: Lint gate cannot run and violations go undetected
top_risks.fix: Upgrade eslint-plugin-react-hooks or downgrade TypeScript to a supported version

actions_0_48h: Fix multi-agent story type errors and add tests
Resolve drama-analyst TypeScript failures and rebuild
Patch esbuild advisory and re-run pnpm audit
Update CI to use pnpm without Docker
notes: Focus on stabilizing TypeScript, lint, and build pipelines before attempting deployment.
